title: Extract rLens bundle helpers
goal: Separate the rLens bundle registry helper functions from grabowski_mcp.py into a clearer internal module or equivalent structure without changing the public MCP contract.

acceptance.assertion: rLens bundle registry parsing, manifest discovery and row status helpers live behind a clearer internal boundary than the monolithic MCP module.
latest_complete_bundles output shape and capability requirements remain backward-compatible unless explicitly documented.
Existing rLens bundle tests continue to pass and new focused tests cover the extracted boundary.

metadata.reason: Kept out of PR #103 to avoid turning a focused hardening patch into module extraction.
